sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78684" key="parari/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραρίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n78684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παραρρίπτω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάραρμα</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παραίρημα</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρᾱρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρήορος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παράρους</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παράρροος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
